title: Course: COSC 315 - Quantum Computing II
description: Advanced exploration of quantum computation beyond introductory concepts. Covers applications including machine learning, linear equation solutions, search algorithms, and cryptography. Examines quantum information and computational complexity.
prerequisites_text: COSC 215 with a grade of C or higher
content:
COSC 315 - Quantum Computing II
Credits: 3
Prerequisites: COSC 215 with a grade of C or higher
Offered: Fall, Spring

Description: Advanced exploration of quantum computation beyond introductory concepts. Covers applications including machine learning, linear equation solutions, search algorithms, and cryptography. Examines quantum information and computational complexity.

Catalog page: https://catalog.morgan.edu/preview_course_nopop.php?catoid=26&coid=68043
